mapper.select: SELECT sc.id AS classId, gg.grade_group_name AS groupName, sc.class_name AS className, gg.id AS groupId, sc.department AS department FROM sys_class sc left join grade_group gg on sc.grade_group = gg.id WHERE sc.school_id = #{schoolId} AND sc.deleted = 0

SELECT sc.id AS classId, gg.grade_group_name AS groupName, gg.grade AS grade, sc.class_name AS className, gg.id AS groupId, sc.department AS department FROM sys_class sc left join grade_group gg on sc.grade_group = gg.id WHERE sc.school_id = #{schoolId} AND sc.sid = #{sid} AND sc.deleted = 0

SELECT sc.id AS classId, sc.class_name AS className, gg.grade_group_name AS groupName, gg.id AS groupId, sc.department AS department FROM sys_class sc left join grade_group gg on sc.grade_group = gg.id WHERE sc.school_id = #{schoolId} AND sc.sid = #{sid} AND sc.deleted = 0 AND gg.deleted = 0 AND gg.grade IN
#{gradeGroupName}

SELECT sc.id AS classId, sc.class_name AS className, gg.id AS groupId, sc.department AS department, gg.grade_group_name AS groupName FROM sys_class sc left join grade_group gg on sc.grade_group = gg.id WHERE sc.school_id = #{schoolId} AND sc.deleted = 0 AND sc.sid = #{sid} AND sc.grade_group = #{gradeGroupId}
